category_sources: source_facts.description says Standard ML implementation; official Poly/ML homepage https://www.polyml.org/ describes it as the Poly/ML implementation of Standard ML.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use Poly/ML: https://www.polyml.org/ and https://polyml.org/Doc.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/polyml/polyml, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Standard ML implementation; source_facts.executables lists poly, polyc, and polyimport; official documentation covers Basis, compiler, debugger, and source overview.
